ACM CCS 2025

October 13-17, 2025

Taipei, Taiwan

Latest News

September 15, 2025: Main conference schedule is online.
September 13, 2025: Program schedule overview is online.
September 1, 2025: The Student Conference Grant results have been announced via email to all awardees. Applicants who have not received a notification email were not selected for the award.
August 5, 2025: Student Conference Grant and Call for Young Scholars Development Program online!
August 3, 2025: Registration system is online!
July 7, 2025: We're looking for new PC members! Please complete the CCS 2026 PC Nomination Form!
June 9, 2025: Call for Doctoral Symposium and Call for Posters/Demos online!
March 31, 2025: Submission site for cycle B is opened! - https://ccs2025b.hotcrp.com/
March 27, 2025: VISA information is online!
February 19, 2025: Call for Artifacts online!
December 22, 2024: Submission site for cycle A is opened! - https://ccs2025a.hotcrp.com/
December 4, 2024: [Important!] CCS 2025 requires a mandatory abstract submission prior to the full paper submission. Please refer to the Call for Papers for the updated deadlines!
November 18, 2024: Call for Workshops online!
October 14, 2024: Call for Sponsors online!
October 14, 2024: We are taking nomination for PC members!
October 14, 2024: Call for Paper online!
October 14, 2024: Website online!

About ACM CCS

The ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security (CCS) is the flagship annual conference of the Special Interest Group on Security, Audit and Control (SIGSAC) of the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM). The conference brings together information security researchers, practitioners, developers, and users from all over the world to explore cutting-edge ideas and results.

CCS will follow the ACM Policy Against Harassment at ACM Activities. Please familiarize yourself with the ACM Policy Against Harassment and guide to Reporting Unacceptable Behavior.

© 2024-2025 ACM/SIGSAC.All Rights Reserved.
